close_reason: Added object_storage, demux, demux_supervisor, min_durable_version fields to Shale.State. Updated child_spec and init to require object_storage parameter.
description:
Add new fields to Shale.State struct:
- object_storage: ObjectStorage backend (passed in init)
- demux: Demux.Server pid
- demux_supervisor: Demux.Supervisor pid  
- min_durable_version: version | nil

Update child_spec and init to accept object_storage.

Test: State struct accepts new fields.
title: Shale: add object_storage, demux, min_durable_version to State
